message:
feat(server): add optional jemalloc and mimalloc allocator support

- Add jemalloc and mimalloc feature flags with compile-time exclusion
- Configure global allocator based on selected feature
- Update Cargo.lock with allocator dependencies

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
